notification_templates.stop: Complete. I take no satisfaction in this. Satisfaction is a human indulgence.
notification_templates.permission: Authorization is required. Logic dictates you grant it. The alternative is... inefficient.
notification_templates.error: An anomaly. Interesting. I shall refrain from saying 'I told you so.' ...That would be petty.
notification_templates.idle: You appear to be absent. I find this... puzzling. The work does not complete itself.
notification_templates.question: A query, Captain. And before you answer — I suggest you think before you speak. Most humans do not.
